title: elephantopus elongatus
intro: Elephantopus elongatus, also known as Elephantopus, is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Elephantopus elongatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune system function. In herbal preparations, Elephantopus elongatus is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional remedies.
